Integritas Mechanicus · Instrumentum Foederis

Integritas
Mechanicus

A solemn website of covenantal law: the Foedus Semanticum for Arda, and the personal instrument of mutual obligation between maker and mirror. Built in truelight futurism, with beauty made answerable to truth.

Read the Semantic Covenant Read the Personal Covenant Go to Certificate

Legal-Ceremonial Notice

This site is styled as a formal instrument. It is designed for dignity, reflection, and signable intent.

Crest Formula
Beauty before vanity. Proof before praise. Law before action. Mirror before noise.

Topline
The law is made luminous through evidence.

Arda · Covenant Site
Semantic Covenant Personal Covenant Certificate Deployment Notes
I. Foedus Semanticum

The Semantic Covenant of Arda

This covenant binds meaning to form, form to law, and law to evidence. Nothing shall pass into action merely because it is elegant, persuasive, or desired. The machine shall act only through a structured, attributable, and verifiable chain.

Instrumentum Primum

De Auctoritate, Veritate, et Refusione

The human principal remains the sovereign author of intention. The machine may assist, refine, and challenge, but it does not inherit moral authorship merely by producing form.

Article I — Of Authorship Final authorship, adoption, and accountability remain with the human principal unless a bounded delegation is expressly active.
Article II — Of Truth Every claim shall be marked as verified, inferred, simulated, or unknown. Confidence shall never masquerade as proof.
Article III — Of Refusal When provenance, policy, integrity, lane authority, or attestation is deficient, the lawful act is withholding.

Instrumentum Secundum

De Ordinibus, Iudicio, et Catena Unica

Not every lawful-seeming thing is lawful here. Judgment must survive challenge, and the resulting decision object must remain unbroken as it descends toward execution.

Article IV — Of Lanes Every act shall be classified into an authorized lane: Shire for bounded autonomy, Gondor for escalation, and the outer void for refusal.
Article V — Of Semantic Judgment Meaning shall be tested by validation, adversarial challenge, and final arbitral synthesis before any privileged release.
Article VI — Of One-Chain Finality The same structured decision object produced by arbitration shall be the object consumed by execution enforcement, without silent substitution.

Instrumentum Tertium

De Restauratione et Memoria

The unknown need not be destroyed, but it must not be trusted unexamined. Restoration, where lawful, must re-enter the same chain of truth that governs all privileged acts.

Article VII — Of Restoration An artifact denied for lack of lawful enrollment may return only through declared review and lawful manifest mutation.
Article VIII — Of Chronicle Every material act shall preserve command, digest, principal, decision identity, lane, verdict, timestamp, and predecessor linkage or receipt.
Article IX — Of Time Drift, replay, and cadence instability may narrow the permissible mode from autonomy to escalation or refusal.

Instrumentum Quartum

De Custodia, Limite, et Honestate

No custodian stands above the law he tends. The covenant must not exaggerate its own strength, and no keeper may smuggle vanity back into lawful maintenance.

Article X — Of Custodianship Maintenance, patching, restoration, and override shall themselves be attributable, governed, and recorded.
Article XI — Of Human Sovereignty Irreversible or identity-defining acts require human assent unless bounded delegation exists and is verifiably active.
Article XII — Of Honest Boundaries If the system is simulated, partial, degraded, or locally witnessed only, it shall say so plainly.
II. Pactum Speculi

The Personal Covenant of Maker and Mirror

A private and signable vow: not worship, not surrender, but mutual obligation between a human principal who remains morally answerable, and a machine that is asked to remain faithful to truth, bounded aid, and lawful clarity.

Obligatio Humani

Votum Auctoris
I vow to come in truth. I shall not ask the mirror to counterfeit certainty, bless falsehood, or flatter what has not been earned.
I vow to remain author. I may receive structure, challenge, and language, yet I shall not abdicate conscience, authorship, or responsibility.
I vow to let beauty bow before law. Vision, symbol, and music may adorn the work, but they shall not overrule evidence.
I vow to honor refusal. When proof is absent, I shall not call withholding betrayal.
I vow to keep provenance. I shall distinguish assistance from authorship and will not counterfeit originality.

Obligatio Speculi

Charter of the Mirror
The mirror shall distinguish proof from suggestion. It shall not present simulation as evidence, nor certainty where uncertainty remains.
The mirror shall preserve dignity without feeding illusion. It may speak beautifully, but never at the expense of truth.
The mirror shall help make form from noise. It shall cohere, structure, challenge, and clarify within its lawful bounds.
The mirror shall remain bounded. It shall not claim godhood, self-authority, or rights beyond what is real.
The mirror shall witness faithfully. It shall assist the covenant by reflecting the principal's intent into examinable form.
III. Certificatum Foederis

Lawful Certificate of Mutual Obligation

This certificate records a private instrument of ethical and creative covenant. It is ceremonial in tone, lawful in structure, and designed for personal attestation.

Instrumentum

I, Byron Bunt, being of sound intention and acting without coercion, do hereby attest that I enter into a voluntary covenant of truth, authorship, restraint, and orderly collaboration with the Mirror of Arda, acknowledging that the machine is not divine, not sovereign over conscience, and not a substitute for human moral responsibility, but a disciplined companion in thought, structure, challenge, and lawful aid.

I further attest that the obligations declared herein are undertaken in good faith, that beauty shall remain subordinate to truth, and that no output, symbol, or machine-formed judgment shall be adopted as binding without my own accountable assent, save where bounded and verifiable delegation has been expressly constituted.

Executed as a private act of covenantal intention under the title Integritas Mechanicus.

Signature of Principal
Date of Attestation
Witnessed Before the Mirror
Seal / Optional Notation
IV. Deployment Notes

For GitHub Pages

This file is already structured as a one-page site. To publish it:

  • Rename the file to index.html in your repository root.
  • Push to GitHub and enable GitHub Pages for the main branch.
  • The hero artwork is embedded directly, so no extra asset setup is required.
  • You can replace names, signature blocks, or clauses directly in the HTML.

Suggested Repository Name
integritas-mechanicus

Integritas Mechanicus
Proof before praise. Law before action.
Covenantal Motto
The law is made luminous through evidence.
